room.caption: [NightmareA3] Take your time and proceed step by step.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(101) global.mapTeleport=1
backFollowFore=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollowFore.type=2 backFollowFore.backSet=backGateA backFollowFore.xMoveScale=0.3 backFollowFore.yMoveScale=1 backFollowFore.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvExGates)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(105) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="I'm being serious when I say that those are perfectly safe to stand on. Nope, no fireballs would ever come through the middle. :3" signSize=2
